_notes.github_token: MUST be a Classic PAT (not Fine-Grained). Create at https://github.com/settings/tokens — needs 'repo' scope
_notes.interval_hours: How often the agent runs automatically (default: every 4 hours)
_notes.veto_seconds: How long the toast stays before auto-pushing. 300=5min, 60=1min, 3600=1hr
